# unifi_acl_rule (Resource)

A network traffic ACL rule on the UniFi controller. Either an IPV4 rule (matching IP addresses/subnets, ports, and protocols) or a MAC rule.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# An IPV4 ACL rule blocking a guest subnet from reaching an internal host on SSH and SMB.
resource "unifi_acl_rule" "block_guest_to_server" {
  type    = "IPV4"
  name    = "Block guest to file server"
  action  = "BLOCK"
  enabled = true

  protocol_filter = ["TCP"]

  source_filter = {
    ip_addresses_or_subnets = ["192.0.2.0/24"]
  }

  destination_filter = {
    ip_addresses_or_subnets = ["198.51.100.10"]
    ports                   = [22, 445]
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `action` (String) Rule action: ALLOW or BLOCK.
- `name` (String) ACL rule name.
- `type` (String) Rule type: IPV4 or MAC.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Free-form rule description.
- `destination_filter` (Attributes) Traffic destination matcher. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--destination_filter))
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the rule is enabled.
- `network_id_filter` (String) UUID of the network the rule applies to. MAC rules only.
- `protocol_filter` (List of String) Protocols the rule applies to: any of TCP, UDP. Omit to match all. IPV4 rules only.
- `source_filter` (Attributes) Traffic source matcher. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--source_filter))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) ACL rule UUID.

<a id="nestedatt--destination_filter"></a>
### Nested Schema for `destination_filter`

Optional:

- `ip_addresses_or_subnets` (List of String) IP addresses or CIDR subnets this side matches. IPV4 rules only.
- `mac_addresses` (List of String) MAC addresses this side matches. MAC rules only.
- `ports` (List of Number) Ports this side matches. Omit to match all ports. IPV4 rules only.
- `prefix_length` (Number) MAC address prefix length (1-48). Omit to match full addresses. MAC rules only.


<a id="nestedatt--source_filter"></a>
### Nested Schema for `source_filter`

Optional:

- `ip_addresses_or_subnets` (List of String) IP addresses or CIDR subnets this side matches. IPV4 rules only.
- `mac_addresses` (List of String) MAC addresses this side matches. MAC rules only.
- `ports` (List of Number) Ports this side matches. Omit to match all ports. IPV4 rules only.
- `prefix_length` (Number) MAC address prefix length (1-48). Omit to match full addresses. MAC rules only.
